post.description: Uses JWT `sub` as the user, verifies membership via user_tenants, and returns a new access token scoped to the requested tenant_id and role. When the HTTP Host resolves to a workspace tenant, `tenant_id` must match that host tenant.

200.description: New web session token for the selected tenant

403.description: HTTP 403 — authenticated user is not a member of the requested tenant_id

User membership not found in tenant

patch.summary: Change user role in tenant scope
patch.description: General role update: cannot change your own role, cannot assign or modify `owner` here, and actor must outrank target and new role. Success bumps `session_version` on the target membership so older JWTs for that user+tenant fail with `AUTH_TOKEN_REVOKED`. RBAC denial codes: RBAC_SELF_ROLE_CHANGE_FORBIDDEN, RBAC_OWNER_ROLE_ASSIGNMENT_FORBIDDEN, RBAC_PROTECTED_ROLE_MODIFICATION_FORBIDDEN, RBAC_INSUFFICIENT_ROLE_PRIVILEGE.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required idempotency key for role mutation.

403.description: Insufficient JWT role, tenant context, or workspace RBAC policy (see operation description for codes)

404.description: User membership not found in tenant

delete.description: Explicitly unsupported in this API. Membership and ownership flows are controlled separately.

405.description: Direct user deletion is not supported

patch.summary: Bulk change user roles in tenant scope
patch.description: Bulk general role update under tenant scope. Each target is evaluated with the same PATCH RBAC policy (no self change, no owner modification/assignment, actor must outrank target and new role). Runs in a single transaction and bumps `session_version` only for memberships whose role actually changes.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Required idempotency key for bulk role mutation.

internalApiKey.name: X-Internal-Api-Key
internalApiKey.description: Internal API key for protected internal endpoints.

labels.description: Tenant-scoped membership labels (`user_tenants.labels`) used for capability aliases / marketing segments.

capabilities.description: Explicit capability grants when present on membership (future DB column); empty until wired.

effective_capabilities.description: Resolved effective capabilities (role ∪ metadata ∪ labels ∪ tenant modules) from DB hydration.

jwt_capability_snapshot.description: Optional JWT `caps` claim snapshot at issuance (informational; re-login after capability changes).

allowed_region_ids.description: Region ids when actor has `tour.regional.manage` (from membership_metadata).

phone.description: Phone number used for OTP login (digits and optional leading +; spaces stripped)

invite_token.description: Optional workspace invite token for invite onboarding continuity

challenge_id.description: OTP challenge id from POST /api/v2/auth/web/otp/request (preferred login path)

requires_registration.description: When true, OTP verification succeeded but account completion is required before issuing a session

onboarding_token.description: Short-lived onboarding token used by registration completion endpoint

phone.description: Phone number to classify for auth onboarding flow

invite_token.description: Optional workspace invite token if user arrived through invite link

onboarding_token.description: Short-lived onboarding token returned after OTP verification for unknown phone

telegram_init_payload.description: Telegram init data payload from Telegram WebApp

tenant_subdomain.description: Workspace hostname label (`tenants.subdomain`); empty when unset. Used for Host-aligned workspace switches.

session_version.description: Membership session version (JWT `sess_ver` must match for this tenant)

tenant_id.description: Target tenant; caller must have an active user_tenants row for this tenant.

link_reason.example: User requested account linking from profile settings

isPhoneVerified.description: Phone verification flag for OTP-capable accounts.

profileRowVersion.description: Optimistic concurrency token from `users.profile_row_version` (for ETag / If-Match).

lastLoginAt.description: Last successful login timestamp when available.

invitedAt.description: Timestamp when invite was issued for membership.

allowedRegionIds.description: Regional scope ids when `tour.regional.manage` is assigned.

effectiveCapabilities.description: Resolved effective capabilities (role ∪ metadata ∪ labels ∪ tenant modules).

telegramLinked.description: True when the user account has a linked Telegram id (for in-app indicators).

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; null when no more rows

userIds.description: Tenant-scoped target user IDs for bulk role update.

role.description: New tenant-scoped role for all target users. The `owner` role cannot be assigned here; only changed memberships bump `session_version`.
New tenant-scoped role for the target user. The `owner` role cannot be assigned here; successful updates bump `user_tenants.session_version`, invalidating prior JWTs for that membership (`sess_ver`).

newOwnerUserId.description: Existing active workspace member that will become the new owner.

capabilities.description: Explicit workspace capability grants stored on membership metadata.

allowedRegionIds.description: Required when granting tour.regional.manage — limits tour list/detail/PATCH scope.

role.description: New tenant-scoped role. Owner-only route; bumps `session_version` so stale JWTs fail membership checks.

permanentDiscountPercentage.description: Permanent discount percentage for this workspace membership (0–100).

badges.description: Reward badge tags stored on membership metadata.

birth_date.description: Date of birth in Gregorian ISO `YYYY-MM-DD` when set

email.description: Contact email when set. Phone-only signups store `phone_*@local.invalid` internally — API omits that placeholder (`null` here).

is_email_verified.description: Whether the current primary email address is verified

is_phone_verified.description: Whether phone is verified via OTP-capable flows

notifications_enabled.description: `true`/`false` when opted in/out; JSON `null` when never set (stored as DB NULL).

profile_row_version.description: Increases on persisted profile/email/phone mutations; pair with weak `ETag` / `If-Match` optimistic locking.
`users.profile_row_version` after persisting ancillary profile fields tied to verification start.

full_name.description: Display name (1–255 characters when set); JSON null clears.

email.description: New email; triggers verification flow when different from current

notifications_enabled.description: Notification preference: `true`/`false` sets explicitly; JSON `null` clears to unset (DB NULL). When omitted, unchanged.

expected_profile_row_version.description: Optimistic concurrency token (same value as `profile_row_version` / weak `ETag` on `GET /me`). **Required** (or send matching `If-Match`) when changing any profile field in this request.

national_id.description: Iran national ID (10 Latin digits; Persian/Arabic digits accepted and normalized). Send null to clear.

gender.description: Self-reported gender; send null to clear

birth_date.description: Gregorian date of birth as YYYY-MM-DD (no time zone). Send null to clear.

new_mobile.description: New mobile number (normalized for OTP; min 8 significant characters)

challenge_id.description: Opaque challenge identifier for OTP verification

code.description: OTP code from SMS or dev flow

location.description: Display / billing location hint until a dedicated column exists.

requiresPayment.description: Force payment intent creation at registration for this tour. Requires module.finance capability.

paymentMode.description: Denali pilot: offline receipt only (no online gateway).

tourThemeLabels.description: Optional snapshot of theme id → display label for detail views when an id is no longer in the workspace catalog.

tripStyles.description: Multi-select execution style (adventure, relaxed, luxury, budget, familyFriendly, photography). Orthogonal to root `tourType` (mountain, city, …). Replaces a legacy singular overview style field (migrated to this array on read).

difficultyLevel.description: Numeric difficulty rating on a 1–10 scale with 0.5 step granularity (allowed values: 1, 1.5, 2, …, 9.5, 10). Replaces the legacy enum.

bestFor.description: Deprecated. Use `participation.suitableFor` / `participation.notSuitableFor` instead. Retained for backward-compatible reads of older JSONB documents.

shortIntro.description: Very short teaser (≤250 chars) for **tour cards / list previews / meta description**. The root tour `description` field holds the long-form story for the **full tour page**. If empty, clients should fall back to `description` when rendering cards.

settingsRegionId.description: Settings → Locations region id (wizard JSONB linkage).

secondaryDestinationIdsRaw.description: Free-text / comma-separated secondary destination ids from the wizard when not normalized to UUID array.

localGuideName.description: Display name for the local guide (when not a workspace user).

denaliTourKind.description: Denali 6-tab wizard tour kind slug (persisted for edit/clone round-trip).

location.description: Optional structured geolocation for this itinerary day.

segmentActivities.description: Structured per-day segments from the tour wizard (distinct from legacy `dayPlans` rows).

technicalSkillRequired.description: Technical mountaineering skill expectation (separate from general fitness).

gearOptionalIds.description: Workspace equipment item ids (optional / recommended gear).

suitableFor.description: Audience groups this tour is well-suited for. Fixed enum: families, solo_travelers, seniors, kids, beginners, experienced_hikers. Must NOT overlap with `notSuitableFor`. Legacy free-form values from older payloads are silently dropped during normalization.

notSuitableFor.description: Audience groups this tour is NOT suitable for. Fixed enum: families, solo_travelers, seniors, kids, beginners, experienced_hikers. Must NOT overlap with `suitableFor`.

sportsInsuranceRequired.description: Participant must carry valid sport / mountaineering insurance (leader-enforced).

registrationNationalIdRequired.description: When true, only authenticated registrants with `national_id` set on their user profile may register or join the waitlist.

departureMeetingTime.description: Local departure meetup time (free text, e.g. 05:30).

transportationNotes.description: Planned transportation notes (mode, route, operator, vehicle).

transportation.description: Deprecated. Use `transportationNotes`. Retained for backward-compatible reads of legacy JSONB; new writes should send `transportationNotes`.

accommodationTypes.description: Accommodation for this trip (multi-select). Allowed: hotel, hostel, tent, mountain_hut, camp, guesthouse.

accommodationNotes.description: Additional accommodation context not covered by fixed categories.

accommodationType.description: Deprecated. Use `accommodationTypes` and optional `accommodationNotes`. Retained for backward-compatible reads of legacy JSONB.

mealPlan.description: Included meals for the trip (single choice).

mealNotes.description: Additional meal or catering context beyond `mealPlan`.

guideLanguageIds.description: Workspace guide language ids (from Settings → Guide languages).

guideLanguage.description: Deprecated. Use `guideLanguageIds` referencing workspace guide languages. Retained for legacy JSONB reads only.

primaryTransportMode.description: Primary mode selected in the wizard (stored in JSONB; may inform root `transportModes`).

fuelShareToman.description: Shared fuel cost in Toman when the tour uses `private_car` (either as wizard primary mode or alongside another mode in root `transportModes`).

privateCarMode.description: Denali supplemental private-car / dong mode (wizard transport tab).

leaderProvidesInsurance.description: Organizer includes some insurance coverage in the tour package.

transportCost.description: Organizer transport fee per person (Toman) — not دنگ.

allowPersonalCar.description: Bus/minibus/train: participants may use a personal car.

dongAmount.description: Personal car fuel share (دنگ) when allowed.

title.example: Damavand summit — 2-day climb from the south face

description.example: A two-day nature tour for members.
description.description: Long-form marketing copy for the **tour detail page** (not list cards). For **public** tours (`lifecycle_status` = Open), treat this as **required** by product policy so detail pages stay complete. Distinct from `tripDetails.overview.shortIntro`, which is a short teaser for cards/previews.

tourType.description: Top-level **category** of the tour (mountain, city, desert, nature, cultural). Distinct from `tripDetails.overview.tripStyles`, which describes the execution style (adventure, luxury, …).

formProfile.description: Optional client hint (ignored on create). The authoritative form profile is resolved server-side from `workspace_tour_wizard_templates.base_profile` for strip, invariants, and persisted `formProfileSnapshot`.

transportModes.description: Organized transport modes for this tour (multi-select: bus, train, plane, private_car). Omit or send `[]` when not applicable. There is no `mixed` value — select every mode that applies.

durationDays.description: Inclusive day count. **Derived** from `tripDetails.logistics.departureDate`/`returnDate` when both are present; the server overrides any value sent here in that case. Direct API callers may still send it without dates.

tripDetails.description: Structured trip details (JSON). On create, the payload is persisted as given (no prior document to merge). Separate from `description` marketing text.

sourcePresetId.description: Source preset ID if created from a preset template

sourceTourId.description: Source tour ID if created as a clone

description.example: A two-day nature tour for members.

autoAcceptRegistrations.description: When false, registrations are not auto-accepted by tour policy.

tourType.description: Top-level **category** (mountain, city, desert, nature, cultural). Execution-style selections live in `tripDetails.overview.tripStyles`.

transportModes.description: Organized transport modes for this tour (multi-select). Empty when unset. No `mixed` slug.

formProfileSnapshot.description: Resolved form profile at creation (`general`, `urban_event`, …); optional frozen snapshot on the row.

destinationId.description: FK to workspace_destinations when the tour is linked to a Settings destination.

destinationName.description: Destination display name (from Settings) when `destinationId` is set.

destinationRegionName.description: Region name for the linked destination, for list/detail UI.

tripDetails.description: Structured trip details (JSONB). Separate from tour `description`.

description.description: Long-form copy for the **tour detail page**. When publishing or opening a tour to the public, this should be populated for consistency with list/detail UX. Teaser text for cards belongs in `tripDetails.overview.shortIntro`, not here.

tourType.description: Top-level **category** of the tour. Use `tripDetails.overview.tripStyles` for the execution-style selections (adventure, luxury, …).

formProfile.description: Optional client hint (ignored on update). The authoritative form profile is resolved server-side from `workspace_tour_wizard_templates.base_profile` for strip, invariants, and `formProfileSnapshot`.

transportModes.description: Replace tour transport modes (multi-select). Send `[]` or `null` to clear. No `mixed` — combine concrete modes.

destinationId.description: Workspace destination from Settings → Locations. Send `null` to clear.

durationDays.description: Inclusive day count. Re-derived server-side from `tripDetails.logistics.departureDate`/`returnDate` when those are part of the patch.

tripDetails.description: Structured trip details (JSON). Patches are deep-merged into the stored document (omit a key to leave it unchanged; arrays replace when sent). Pass root `null` to clear the whole blob. Separate from `description` marketing text.

total.description: Total matching rows, or -1 when include_total=false on the list request

totalMinor.description: Payable total in minor units at booking time

pricingRuleVersion.description: Pricing engine / rule-set version frozen at booking time

listPriceMinor.description: Reference list price minor units when applicable

rowVersion.description: Optimistic concurrency token (`registrations.row_version`). Send as `expected_row_version` on PATCH status/payment.

paymentStatus.description: Persisted aggregate status (full entity enum). PATCH `/payment` accepts only NotPaid, Partial, Paid.

lockedPricing.description: Authoritative payable price frozen at booking time. Clients must use this (not live tour pricing) for checkout amounts.

payload.description: Low-validation snapshot of React Hook Form state.

version.description: Optimistic-lock version from last GET or successful PATCH.

telegramUserId.description: Telegram user id; required when entryMode is telegram

vehicleSeatCapacity.description: Optional vehicle seat capacity if participant is driver

discountCode.description: Optional promo code; **final price is always computed server-side** — never trust a client-supplied amount.

telegramUserId.description: Telegram user id; required when entryMode is telegram

tourId.description: Tour to register for (booking is tied directly to the tour)

expected_row_version.description: Optimistic concurrency token from `GET /api/v2/registrations/:id` (`rowVersion` / `registrations.row_version`). Must match the row at apply time.
Optimistic concurrency token from `GET /api/v2/registrations/:id` (`rowVersion`). Must match the row at apply time.

clientSecret.description: Stripe PaymentIntent client secret when applicable.

checkoutUrl.description: Hosted checkout URL (e.g. Zibal) when applicable.

itemIds.description: Every guide language id for the workspace, in display order

formProfile.description: Tour creation wizard profile bound to this theme.
Tour creation wizard profile bound to this theme.
Form profile this preset targets (wizard compatibility filter).

defaults.description: Partial tour create wizard defaults (JSON object).

itemIds.description: Every preset id exactly once, workspace order.

formProfile.description: Form profile this preset targets (wizard compatibility filter).

rowVersion.description: Optimistic lock version from last GET

plaintextPayloadUtf8.description: UTF-8 JSON string of medical fields (encrypted at rest server-side). Never logged.
